title: stachys iberica subsp. stenostachya
intro: Stachys iberica subsp. stenostachya is a subspecies of the Stachys iberica plant, also known as 'Iberian Woundwort', which is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of the Caucasus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable remedy for wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Stachys iberica subsp. stenostachya include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized for a variety of health purposes.
